input: The team shipped API v2 with pagination, rate limiting, and a new search endpoint. The migration is backward-compatible and the old endpoint will be deprecated in 90 days.
The meeting concluded that the marketing budget will be cut by 15%, hiring of two engineers was approved, and the launch date was pushed from March to April.
The incident was caused by a deploy that exhausted database connections. The mitigation was rolling back the deploy; the permanent fix is a bounded connection pool. No data loss.
